notes: Stable POS GST Persistence, Offline-First Database Normalization, and optimized synchronization.

history.changes: Stable POS GST Persistence, Offline-First Database Normalization, and optimized synchronization.
Implemented Station-Based KOT Routing with cross-app category enrichment. Fixed stale closure in socket listeners. Optimized Captain App print flow.
Refactored backend architecture to a local SQLite-first model. Rebuilt offline capabilities and removed strict cloud-only constraints.
Baseline stable version before migration to local-first architecture.
